articles.author: Anand Krishnamoorthy, Abhishek Vishnoi
articles.title: US Stock Futures Fall, Oil Climbs on Iran Tensions: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Asian stocks pulled back from a record high and crude oil rose as escalating tensions in the Middle East revived concerns over energy supplies, testing the durability of the recent equity rally.
articles.content:
